channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Abuse of parking restrictions, 3rd July
item.description:
Multiple vehicles ignoring parking restrictions

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Gervase Street, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Obstructing, illegal parking, 3rd July
item.description:
Obstructing vehicles exiting Grenier Apartments via vehicle gate: reduced turning circle; on double yellow

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Gervase Street, Peckham, Greater London

item.title: The street light outside 2A Downs HIll, BR3 5HB is not working., 3rd July
item.description:
The light outside 2A Downs Hill, Beckenham has stopped working.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Downs Hill, Shortlands, Greater London

item.title: Illegal Parking and Hidden Number Plate, 3rd July
item.description:
This van has been illegally parking on the corner of Holtwhite Avenue and Holtwhites Hill for over a year, and even has covers for the license plate.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Holtwhites Hill, Enfield
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 2 bags rubbish, 3rd July
item.description:
Dumped outside St Augustine’s church blocking safe access along pavement
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Slade Green Road, Slade Green, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Trees on boundary to Churchfields rec, 3rd July
item.description:
I’ve been in email conversation with Bill Moxham, we have arranged for a tree surgeon to reduce the trees behind 67, 65 and 63 Kendall Road - with permission from our neighbours and him. At our group cost. We would also like to seek permission to reduce the height of the trees which are overshadowing the gardens, again at our cost.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kendall Road, Elmers End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dog in the boiling hot underground, 2nd July
item.description:
I have asked the woman whether the dog has eaten and had water, she said 100% yes but didn’t sound convincing at all

Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overhanging vegetation blocking pavement, 2nd July
item.description:
There is overhanging vegetation blocking the pavement in two places in Finsbury Way. Near the junction with Upton Road South (tree overhanging) and near the junction with Hartlands Close (brambles blocking pavement). Can these please be cut back soonest as very dangerous for those on motility scooters and mothers with pushchairs/prams. Thank you so much. Kindest regards

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Finsbury Way, Bexley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Number of broken, uneven and/or loose pavement slabs along Glenhurst Avenue, 2nd July
item.description:
There are a large number broken, uneven and/or loose pavement slabs along Glenhurst Avenue, especially outside house number 49. The stretch of broken pavement slabs is more than 5 meters long and the uneven is more than 50mm high. I have witnessed several pedestrians tripped over and sustained serious injury as a result. This is particular dangerous to children and elderly people. These issues have been there for more than 6 months and are getting worse. Urgent repair is required along the pavements in Glenhurst Avenue to prevent further accident and injuries.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 53, Glenhurst Avenue, Bexley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street light not working, 2nd July
item.description:
Street light outside 13-15 craydene road not working
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 21, Craydene Road, North End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Low-hanging branches and fallen fruit obstructing pavement, 2nd July
item.description:
The branches are hanging low over the public pavement and the tree does not appear to have been maintained. Ripe fruit is falling onto the pavement, creating mess and potential slip/accessibility issues. The tree needs attention as it is affecting the p

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Coopersale Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly Tipping, 2nd July
item.description:
I’m writing to report a recurring fly-tipping problem at the bin collection point near my property. This has become a weekly problem, with rubbish repeatedly dumped beside the bins between collections. It’s causing an eyesore, blocking pavement access, an

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Sandringham Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street light not working, 2nd July
item.description:
Street light is not working opposite 24 Lucas Road

item.title: Gipsy Hill SE19 a few yards from Gipsy Road junction is, 2nd July
item.description:
Gipsy Hill SE19 a few yards from Gipsy Road junction is a traffic island. On said island one of the Keep Left boards is broken – lying flat and the second one could well be also broken. Please action repairs.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 129, Gipsy Hill, Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flyposting, 2nd July
item.description:
Two inappropriate signs loosely attached to lamp posts outside 7 & 19 Ryecroft Road. Please remove.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 15, Ryecroft Road, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Over grown shrub and hedges footpath blocked, 2nd July
item.description:
Tree and hedges overgrown and blocking footpath
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Finsbury Way, Bexley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Grass seeds, 2nd July
item.description:
Every year my dog and multiple other dogs are taken to the vet’s because of the grass seeds left to grow for wildlife. There are plenty of other plants for the wildlife that don’t danger our pets. Dogs die because of grass seeds, I’ve also spent ££££ on vet bills as reoccurring injuries aren’t covered on insurance.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Blenheim Road, Southborough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Crystal Palace Park Road SE26 between streetlight, 2nd July
item.description:
Crystal Palace Park Road SE26 between streetlight columns ID numbered 27 and 28 is a green footpath box which is tagged. Google Streetview: https://www.google.com/maps/place/56+Crystal+Palace+Park+Rd,+London+SE26+6UG/@51.4208143,-0.0616141,3a,75y,47.46h,91.97t/data=!3m7!1e1!3m5!1sZ-ib9jIDH0GelBv1P6T4HQ!2e0!6shttps:%2F%2Fstreetviewpixels-pa.googleapis.com%2Fv1%2Fthumbnail%3Fcb_client%3Dmaps_sv.tactile%26w%3D900%26h%3D600%26pitch%3D-1.9686784066240506%26panoid%3DZ-ib9jIDH0GelBv1P6T4HQ%26yaw%3D47.4617041378579!7i16384!8i8192!4m6!3m5!1s0x48760165b44c3c79:0x89efb66bbafe6f4e!8m2!3d51.4228754!4d-0.0626819!16s%2Fg%2F11c22qb2f7?entry=ttu&g_ep=EgoyMDI2MDYyOS4wIKXMDSoASAFQAw%3D%3D
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 23, Crystal Palace Park Road, Crystal Palace, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Childs play area . Broken and dangerous. Large screws broken play equipment. In disrepair, 2nd July
item.description:
Play area in poor condition. Dangerous and broken .large screws broken wood ...hazardous to young children. Needs attention asap

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): St Norbert Green, Brockley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
